title: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
summary: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
whyItMatters: LLM agents are increasingly improved without weight updates by evolving a natural-language artifact, such as reflections, workflows, playbooks, cheatsheets, or optimized prompts, that conditions a frozen policy. Such methods are typically reported as wins on the single benchmark where they help. We study them apples-to-apples and surface a sharper picture.…
